prompt: A cinematic fantasy poster in the style of an epic medieval throne-room drama, showing a modern woman seated confidently on a dark iron sword throne. She is centered in a full-body portrait, sitting with one leg crossed over the other and both arms resting casually on the throne arms, projecting relaxed queenly confidence. She has long, wavy blonde hair falling over her shoulders, and wears contemporary casual clothing instead of period costume: a fitted long-sleeve deep burgundy shirt, dark blue skinny jeans, and black ankle boots. The throne is massive, jagged, and forged from overlapping weathered swords, filling most of the background. The setting is a dim, moody royal hall with warm firelight, soft glowing candles, faint sparks or embers in the air, and two vertical banners in the distant background bearing a red three-headed dragon-style sigil. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting, rich dark metallic textures, warm orange highlights, and a polished premium fantasy-poster look. Add faint handwritten-style text near the upper left arc of the throne reading LAREENA STARKER. At the bottom, add large ornate metallic-gold title typography in a fantasy serif style reading BABE on the first line, smaller centered "OF" below it, and THRONES in very large letters across the bottom, with the O stylized as a circular emblem with vertical bars. Vertical poster composition, symmetrical framing, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, regal but playful modern parody of an iconic fantasy throne poster.
